hero.headlineAfterAccent: systems you can run in production

metrics.label: Typed services, data planes, models, evaluations, and user facing surfaces in one lane
Specs, rituals, and measurable milestones engineered for distributed teams

pillars.title: Architecture before hero features
pillars.body: Interfaces, ownership boundaries, and failure modes are defined first so velocity does not melt operability.

pillars.title: AI with production contracts
pillars.body: Grounded retrieval, deterministic fallbacks, logging, and governance so assistants stay inside business rules.

projects.lead: APIs, storefronts, automation, and assistant style features that moved from proposal to monitored production.

finalCta.title: Private strategy consultation
finalCta.body: Bring ambiguity. Leave with sequencing, staffing assumptions, and a pragmatic technical narrative you can share internally.
